title: Implement storefront catalog browsing and filter UI
verify: Storefront renders catalog product cards/list entries from backend data.
Category navigation, search input, required filters, selected filter state, and pagination/load-more state are usable.
Storefront does not hardcode catalog data as source of truth.

verify.summary: Storefront catalog UI verification passed in manual T2 mode. Fresh storefront catalog tests prove backend Store catalog route consumption with explicit query params, product cards from backend response data, category navigation, search input, required filters, selected filter state, pagination state, empty result state, and no embedded seeded catalog source data in UI. A fresh HTML trace was recorded. Storefront typecheck and Memory Bank lint passed; strict doctor passed before closure with only the expected TASK-007 ready-candidate warning. HTTP check against the local storefront dev server returned 200.

evidence_required: Screenshot or trace showing catalog with categories and filters during execution evidence.
constraints: Storefront reads catalog data through backend APIs.
Storefront may control filter display labels/order but not invent available values.
Catalog browsing should be directly usable as a buyer-facing screen.
invariants: Do not hardcode product catalog data in the storefront as source of truth.
Do not implement product detail variant selection or cart behavior in FT-001.
Do not use the storefront as authoritative backend state.
purpose: Make the backend catalog contract usable through the buyer-facing storefront.
success_outcome: Buyer can browse products, categories, search, and required filters in the storefront.
anti_goals: Do not implement add-to-cart or product detail selection.
Do not create a custom admin surface.
Do not hardcode seeded catalog data into UI code.

forbidden_scope: backend catalog contract changes not covered by TASK-006
stop_conditions: Storefront cannot consume the backend catalog contract.
UI work requires changing FT-001 API semantics.
Verification cannot show categories and required filters are usable.
